prompt: Review PR #4350 in DataDog/dd-trace-go. It adds an OpenTelemetry log exporter integration for sending logs to the Datadog backend.

assertions.text: Flags incorrect initialism in field/method names — 'Otel' should be 'OTel' (e.g., logsOtelEnabled → logsOTelEnabled, LogsOtelEnabled → LogsOTelEnabled)
Notes that sync.Once prevents retrying initialization after failure — a failed initialization permanently disables the feature
Flags that StartIfEnabled/StopIfEnabled has no call site in the tracer lifecycle and must be called manually by users
Flags that DD sampling priority is not mapped to OTel TraceFlags — always setting TraceFlagsSampled ignores the tracer's sampling decision
